Class HomeUpgrade

java.lang.Object
sims.world.HomeUpgrade
public class HomeUpgrade extends Object
Represents an upgrade that can be applied to a HomeLocation. A HomeUpgrade has a name, price, associated location, and an activity that becomes available once the upgrade is purchased.

This class tracks whether the upgrade has been purchased and provides access to its properties such as name, price, and related activity.

  • Constructor Details

    • HomeUpgrade

      public HomeUpgrade(String location, String name, int price, Activity action)
      Constructs a new HomeUpgrade with the specified details.
      Parameters:
      location - the location where the upgrade applies
      name - the name of the upgrade
      price - the price of the upgrade
      action - the activity unlocked by this upgrade

  • Method Details

    • getUpgrade

      public Boolean getUpgrade()
      Returns whether this upgrade has been purchased.
      Returns:
